mapper.insert: INSERT INTO flower_record (student_id, change_amount, balance, type, source_id, remark, operator_id, operate_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{changeAmount}, #{balance}, #{type}, #{sourceId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{remark}, #{operatorId}, #{operateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM flower_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY operate_time DESC
SELECT * FROM flower_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY operate_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE flower_record SET source_id = #{sourceId} WHERE id = #{id}
